title: Resolve MeshCore command drift across firmware and clients
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-9c4y.1 research found source drift between MeshCore firmware, docs, Flutter client, and Python client. Firmware e8d3c53 returns OK for CMD_SEND_CHANNEL_TXT_MSG while docs/Flutter imply MSG_SENT in some paths, and meshcore_py 5bac357 lacks newer firmware command enums such as CMD_SEND_CHANNEL_DATA=0x3e and CMD_SEND_RAW_PACKET=0x41. What needs to be done: build a pinned command/response matrix against the target MeshCore app/client versions, decide which response behavior LICHEN should emulate for compatibility, and add tests/vectors for divergent cases. Acceptance criteria: drift table records source SHAs and file refs; selected LICHEN behavior is justified; native_sim/host tests cover SEND_CHANNEL_TXT_MSG ack behavior and unsupported/stale client commands.
